CustomField.description: Name and type of third party organization involved. For a Company-organized Event, identify whether a Third Party Provider will be used or whether Viatris will organize it directly.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Name and type of third party organization involved. For a Company-organized Event, identify whether a Third Party Provider will be used or whether Viatris will organize it directly.
CustomField.label: Tthird party organization Type
